ddls:
CREATE TABLE "survey_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey mode (e.g., CATI, CAPI) */,
  "mode_description" TEXT /* Description of the survey mode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey mode was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey mode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_combinations" (
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each combination of survey modes */,
  "mode1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first survey mode in the combination */,
  "mode2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second survey mode in the combination */,
  "combination_name" TEXT /* Name of the combination (e.g., CATI+CAPI) */,
  "is_interviewer_administered" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the combination is interviewer-administered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the combination was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the combination was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the combination is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_combinations_mode2_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode2_id") REFERENCES survey_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_combinations_mode1_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode1_id") REFERENCES survey_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarterly_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey combination */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data (e.g., 2019, 2020) */,
  "number_of_countries" INTEGER /* Number of countries using the survey combination in the specified quarter and year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterly_data_combination_id FOREIGN KEY ("combination_id") REFERENCES survey_combinations ("combination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country's participation */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
